briefdescription.para: Acknowledgment of connection request.

detaileddescription.para: Event result accompanying the event indicates whether the connection failed or succeeded.

briefdescription.para: Disconnection Event.

detaileddescription.para: MQTT Client Reference is no longer valid once this event is received for the client.

briefdescription.para: Publish event received when message is published on a topic client is subscribed to.

simplesect.para: PUBLISH event structure only contains payload size, the payload data parameter should be ignored. Payload content has to be read manually with mqtt_read_publish_payload function.

briefdescription.para: Acknowledgment for published message with QoS 1.
Reception confirmation for published message with QoS 2.
Release of published message with QoS 2.
Confirmation to a publish release message with QoS 2.
Acknowledgment to a subscribe request.
Acknowledgment to a unsubscribe request.
Ping Response from server.
Authentication packet received from server.
MQTT Asynchronous Events notified to the application from the module through the callback registered by the application.
Protocol level for 3.1.0.
Protocol level for 3.1.1.
Protocol level for 5.0.
MQTT version protocol level.
Lowest Quality of Service, no acknowledgment needed for published message.
Medium Quality of Service, if acknowledgment expected for published message, duplicate messages permitted.
Highest Quality of Service, acknowledgment expected and message shall be published only once.

detaileddescription.para: Message not published to interested parties unless client issues a PUBREL.

briefdescription.para: MQTT Quality of Service types.
Connection accepted.
The Server does not support the level of the MQTT protocol requested by the Client.
The Client identifier is correct UTF-8 but not allowed by the Server.
The Network Connection has been made but the MQTT service is unavailable.
The data in the user name or password is malformed.
The Client is not authorized to connect.
MQTT 3.1 CONNACK return codes.
MQTT 5.0 CONNACK reason codes (MQTT 5.0, chapter 3.2.2.2).
Subscription with QoS 0 succeeded.
Subscription with QoS 1 succeeded.
Subscription with QoS 2 succeeded.
Subscription for a topic failed.
MQTT SUBACK return codes.
MQTT Disconnect reason codes (MQTT 5.0, chapter 3.14.2.1).
MQTT Authenticate reason codes (MQTT 5.0, chapter 3.15.2.1).
Use non secure TCP transport for MQTT connection.
Shall not be used as a transport type.

detaileddescription.para: Indicator of maximum transport types possible.

briefdescription.para: MQTT transport type.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* mqtt_evt_cb_t) (struct mqtt_client *client, const struct mqtt_evt *evt)
memberdef.name: mqtt_evt_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Asynchronous event notification callback registered by the application.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies the client for which the event is notified.
Event description along with result and associated parameters (if any).

briefdescription.para: Initializes the client instance.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: Shall be called to initialize client structure, before setting any client parameters and before connecting to broker.

briefdescription.para: API to request new MQTT client connection.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: This memory is assumed to be resident until mqtt_disconnect is called.
Any subsequent changes to parameters like broker address, user name, device id, etc. have no effect once MQTT connection is established.
0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.
Default protocol revision used for connection request is 3.1.1. Please set client.protocol_version = MQTT_VERSION_3_1_0 to use protocol 3.1.0.
Please modify CONFIG_MQTT_KEEPALIVE time to override default of 1 minute.

briefdescription.para: API to publish messages on topics.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Parameters to be used for the publish message. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API used by client to send acknowledgment on receiving QoS1 publish message.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called on reception of MQTT_EVT_PUBLISH with QoS level MQTT_QOS_1_AT_LEAST_ONCE.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Identifies message being acknowledged.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API used by client to send acknowledgment on receiving QoS2 publish message.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called on reception of MQTT_EVT_PUBLISH with QoS level MQTT_QOS_2_EXACTLY_ONCE.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Identifies message being acknowledged.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API used by client to request release of QoS2 publish message.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called on reception of MQTT_EVT_PUBREC.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Identifies message being released.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API used by client to send acknowledgment on receiving QoS2 publish release message.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called on reception of MQTT_EVT_PUBREL.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Identifies message being completed.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to request subscription of one or more topics on the connection.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Subscription parameters. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to request unsubscription of one or more topics on the connection.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Parameters describing topics being unsubscribed from. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: QoS included in topic description is unused in this API.
0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to send MQTT ping.

detaileddescription.para: The use of this API is optional, as the library handles the connection keep-alive on it's own, see mqtt_live.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which procedure is requested.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to disconnect MQTT connection.

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which procedure is requested.
Optional Disconnect parameters. May be NULL. Ignored if MQTT 3.1.1 is used.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to send an authentication packet to the server.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Parameters to be used for the auth message. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: API to abort MQTT connection.

detaileddescription.para: This will close the corresponding transport without closing the connection gracefully at the MQTT level (with disconnect message).

parameterdescription.para: Identifies client instance for which procedure is requested.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: This API should be called periodically for the client to be able to keep the connection alive by sending Ping Requests if need be.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: Application shall ensure that the periodicity of calling this function makes it possible to respect the Keep Alive time agreed with the broker on connection. mqtt_connect for details on Keep Alive time.
0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: Helper function to determine when next keep alive message should be sent.

detaileddescription.para: Can be used for instance as a source for poll timeout.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested.

simplesect.para: Time in milliseconds until next keep alive message is expected to be sent. Function will return -1 if keep alive messages are not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Receive an incoming MQTT packet.

detaileddescription.para: The registered callback will be called with the packet content.

simplesect.para: In case of PUBLISH message, the payload has to be read separately with mqtt_read_publish_payload function. The size of the payload to read is provided in the publish event structure.
This is a non-blocking call.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.

simplesect.para: 0 or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: Read the payload of the received PUBLISH message.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called within the MQTT event handler, when MQTT PUBLISH message is notified.

simplesect.para: This is a non-blocking call.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Buffer where payload should be stored.
Length of the buffer, in bytes.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: Blocking version of mqtt_read_publish_payload function.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Buffer where payload should be stored.
Length of the buffer, in bytes.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read or a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: Blocking version of mqtt_read_publish_payload function which runs until the required number of bytes are read.

parameterdescription.para: Client instance for which the procedure is requested. Shall not be NULL.
Buffer where payload should be stored.
Number of bytes to read.

simplesect.para: 0 if success, otherwise a negative error code (errno.h) indicating reason of failure.

briefdescription.para: Initialize UTF-8 encoded string from C literal string.

parameterdescription.para: Literal string from which to generate mqtt_utf8 object.
